title: D365 CE Context Exporter Config
description: Configuration file for a D365 CE Context Exporter spec.

spec.description: The spec name. Used as the stem of the output filename (e.g. 'Contoso' → 'Contoso.context.md').

version.description: Schema version of this config file.

transformation.description: Filename of the Scriban template in config/transformations/ used to render the output Markdown.

frontMatter.description: Key/value pairs injected as YAML front-matter into the output document.

interpreter.description: 'auto' uses interpreter discovery (venv → py launcher → PATH). Any other value is an absolute path to python.exe.

venv.description: Path to the virtual environment directory. Supports %LOCALAPPDATA% and other %VAR% tokens.

attributeDenyList.description: Attribute names (or substrings) to exclude from the serialised output.

legal.description: Path to a LEGAL.md file (relative to the base directory) whose content is prepended to the output context file before delivery. Omit or leave empty to skip the legal notice step.

queries.description: Ordered list of queries to execute. Results are merged into intermediate.json.

id.description: Unique identifier for this query. Used as the per-query raw output filename.

source.description: Filename of the FetchXML file in config/queries/. Required when type is 'fetchxml'.

path.description: OData relative path appended to the environment URL. Required when type is 'webapi'.

metadataTarget.description: Metadata category to retrieve. Required when type is 'metadata'.

resultKey.description: Top-level key under which this query's result is stored in intermediate.json. Referenced as a variable in templates.

maxRecords.description: Maximum number of records to retrieve. Applies to fetchxml and webapi queries.

select.description: OData $select fields. Only applicable to webapi queries.
